note: Phase 5.1 — dated ACTUAL strength returns (personnel + key equipment) for pilot formations, keyed by unit id, ascending by date. Shown in the unit panel against the doctrinal nominal establishment (templates.ts). Curated from references; append-only and crowdsourcable. Figures are honest approximations from the cited works, not survey-grade.

de-h-pz-div-16.note: worn down on the Volga as Uranus opens

su-gd-rd-13.note: halved in two weeks of street fighting

su-10th-nkvd-division.note: the Stalingrad garrison as the Germans reach the Volga
bled white holding the city centre, station and Mamayev Kurgan
a remnant of ~200 men, withdrawn across the Volga (later Order of Lenin)

su-front-crimean.note: 44th/47th/51st Armies behind the Parpach narrows on the eve of Trappenjagd
shattered in eleven days — about 170,000 lost, most taken prisoner

de-h-armee-17.note: German and Romanian forces sealed into the Kuban bridgehead
survivors evacuated across the Kerch strait to the Crimea (Op. Brunhild)
